non_goals: Do not treat narada-andrey.Kevin as narada.architect.

requested_narada_actions.details: Evaluate commits 4744f0de and bf12b0f7 for concept correctness, launch-packet contract adequacy, and regression coverage.

Record that chapter 1264-1266 was executed by narada-andrey.Kevin under operator direction while incorrectly declaring narada.architect for lifecycle mutation. Preserve the distinction between useful product evidence and flawed acting-principal evidence.

Either accept the commits as an operator-directed cross-site handoff after annotation, request a clean narada.architect replay/review, or open a corrective task if lifecycle authorship must be rewritten/compensated by Narada proper policy.

Inspect env_ec8a89e4-5dbf-4cb6-aa31-a3002e7ef747 and the associated untracked mutation evidence from the accidental work-next call. Decide whether to release, close as accidental handling, or route normally.

requested_narada_actions.action: Promote launch affordance work if accepted
requested_narada_actions.details: Use the new Agent Carrier contract to make startup command/package data first-class end to end: carrier launch result should include the startup command name/package pointer, required environment, native execution policy, MCP approval posture, result sentinel, and clear not_claimed boundaries.

Narada proper should own the portable product contract and doctrine. User Site should carry operator-specific launch affordance/profile defaults. PC Site should own machine-specific carrier/runtime observations and permission-state evidence.

suggested_acceptance_criteria: Narada proper has a durable review/admission record for commits 4744f0de and bf12b0f7.
Identity-authority defect is explicitly recorded and does not remain hidden inside closed chapter evidence.
A follow-up task, review, or decision exists for launch affordance package inclusion.
The accidental inbox claim is either released, acknowledged, or routed with trace.
payload.summary: User-locus agent narada-andrey.Kevin completed Agent Carrier concept and launch-packet work in Narada proper under explicit operator direction, but incorrectly used narada.architect as the lifecycle acting identity during chapter execution. Narada proper should review the product changes on their merits, repair/annotate the identity-authority trace, and decide how to absorb the launch affordance contract as first-class package work.
payload.title: Review and repair Agent Carrier factorization handoff from narada-andrey.Kevin
